segments.original_text: ような印象があります

segments.text: Coming in aggressive, but Shuton takes the space and adapts
segments.original_text: 強気に来るがShuton選手は距離を取って対応する

segments.text: Banana setup, moving toward the inside
segments.original_text: バナナ押しから内側見ている
横スマッシュホールド

full_text: That's the vibe I'm getting. Now the ledge. Poking out. Coming in aggressive, but Shuton takes the space and adapts. Banana setup, moving toward the inside. Holding that forward smash.

corrections.rule: player name: note - this match is Tweek vs Snow but commentator references

corrections.original: よこスマッシュビーホールド
corrections.corrected: 横スマッシュホールド
